reasoning: Z.ai (formerly Zhipu AI) is a strong competitor but has consistently trailed the very top models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and potentially DeepSeek on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena. Given the knowledge cutoff of Nov 9, 2025, there are only 7 weeks until the Dec 31 resolution date. Major competitors have recently released or are expected to release next-generation models (e.g., Gemini 3, Claude Opus 4.1, Grok 4, new OpenAI models). Furthermore, the resolution criteria specify that ties are resolved alphabetically, meaning Z.ai would lose to almost all major competitors (Anthropic, Google, Meta, OpenAI, xAI) in the event of a tie for the top score. Considering these factors, the probability of Z.ai obtaining the outright top spot in the overall Arena by the cutoff is extremely low.
batch_queries: Will Z.ai have the top AI model on December 31?
